title: The Great Password Disaster of Wednesday Night

sentences.en: Wednesday night. I had a school project due tomorrow, and of course, this was the exact night our home network decided to stop working.
sentences.zh: 星期三晚上。我明天有一份作業要交，當然，就偏偏是今晚，我們家的網路決定罷工。

sentences.en: I tried to search for one simple fact online, and the screen just spun and spun, refusing to load anything at all.
sentences.zh: 我想搜尋一個很簡單的事實，結果螢幕就一直轉圈圈，什麼都載不出來。

sentences.en: William, being extremely helpful in his own chaotic way, suggested I just type the password again, slower this time.
sentences.zh: William 用他自己那種混亂的方式非常「熱心」地建議我，再打一次密碼，這次慢一點打。

sentences.en: I typed the password four different times, each attempt slightly different, none of them working, all of them making me more annoyed.
sentences.zh: 我打了四次密碼，每次都稍微打得不太一樣，沒有一次成功，每次都讓我更煩躁。

sentences.en: Eventually Dad came in, restarted the router, and asked if I had tried turning it off and on again, which apparently fixes ninety percent of technology problems.
sentences.zh: 後來爸爸進來，重開了路由器，問我有沒有試過關掉再重開，這招顯然能解決九成的科技問題。

sentences.en: The connection came back just long enough for me to search for my topic, download one article, and lose the network again five minutes later.
sentences.zh: 網路連線恢復了，剛好夠我搜尋主題、下載一篇文章，然後五分鐘後又斷線了。

sentences.en: When I finally finished my report, I needed to print it, which meant fighting our ancient family printer, a machine that hates all of us equally.
sentences.zh: 終於寫完報告後，我需要把它印出來，這代表要跟我們家那台古董印表機搏鬥，那台機器對我們每個人都一視同仁地討厭。

sentences.en: The printer connected to my laptop, disconnected itself for no reason, and then printed three blank pages before finally printing my actual report.
sentences.zh: 印表機先連上我的筆電，然後莫名其妙自己斷線，接著印出三張空白紙，最後才總算印出我真正的報告。

sentences.en: While I fought with the printer, William was on the family computer, uploading videos of Perry to some website he found, without asking anyone first.
sentences.zh: 在我跟印表機搏鬥的時候，William 在用家裡的電腦，把 Perry 的影片上傳到他找到的某個網站，事先完全沒問過任何人。

sentences.en: When Mom found out, she reminded him that not every user on the internet needs to see our dog trying to eat a slipper.
sentences.zh: 媽媽發現後，提醒他，網路上不是每個使用者都需要看到我們家的狗努力想吃拖鞋的影片。

sentences.en: William argued that Perry deserved an audience, and honestly, I could not fully disagree with that particular argument.
sentences.zh: William 辯稱 Perry 值得擁有觀眾，老實說，這個論點我還真的沒辦法完全反駁。

sentences.en: Later, I tried to contact Bernice to ask about tomorrow's homework, but every text message I sent seemed to disappear into the internet without a reply.
sentences.zh: 後來，我試著聯絡 Bernice 問明天的作業，但我傳的每一則簡訊，好像都消失在網路裡，沒有得到任何回覆。

sentences.en: It turned out her family's network was having the exact same problem, which felt oddly comforting, like we were suffering together.
sentences.zh: 結果她家的網路也遇到一模一樣的問題，這感覺莫名地讓人安心，好像我們是一起在受苦。

sentences.en: Dad eventually found a broken link in the wiring behind the router, which apparently was the whole reason our connection kept dropping all evening.
sentences.zh: 爸爸最後在路由器後面的電線裡找到一條斷掉的線路，顯然這就是我們整晚連線一直斷掉的真正原因。

sentences.en: "Technology depends on so many tiny connections," he said, twisting the wire back into place. "One small broken link can ruin the whole system."
sentences.zh: 「科技靠的是無數細小的連結，」他一邊把電線接回原位一邊說：「一條小小斷掉的線，就能毀掉整個系統。」

sentences.en: By the time everything worked again, it was almost my bedtime, and I still needed to change my password to something William could not guess.
sentences.zh: 等一切終於恢復正常，都快到我睡覺時間了，我還是得把密碼改成一個 William 猜不到的組合。

sentences.en: I picked a new password, typed it twice to be sure, and immediately forgot it, which felt like a fitting way to end this particular night.
sentences.zh: 我選了一個新密碼，打了兩次確認，結果馬上就忘記了，這感覺很適合為今晚做個總結。

sentences.en: Lesson of the day: our home network survived the night, my report got printed, and Perry now has a small, slightly embarrassing audience online.
sentences.zh: 今日心得：我們家的網路撐過了這一晚，我的報告印出來了，而 Perry 現在在網路上有了一小群、有點丟臉的觀眾。

quiz.question: What does Dad eventually find causing the network problems?
options: A broken link in the wiring behind the router.

quiz.question: What does William do without asking anyone first?
options: Upload videos of Perry to a website.

quiz.question: Why can't Coco and Bernice reach each other by text that night?
options: Both of their families' networks are having the same problem.
